microsoft_ft: Scaled Azure's **proof-of-value** validation program from a 2-person operation into a platformized system, standardizing deployments to sustain 45+ annual resilience drills and drive **$14M+ business impact** across enterprise customers including Databricks, Walmart, SAP, and NetApp.

Led **0→1 development** of an internal Resilience Automation Platform, defining product requirements and self-service scheduling capabilities that reduced operational toil by 30% and transitioned execution to a scalable model.

Served as embedded technical lead for a sovereign-cloud network isolation deployment tied to a **$1.5B+ enterprise contract**, bridging executive stakeholders and engineering teams to deliver on time under high visibility.
Built an internal **AI agent** for drill planning, restructuring end-to-end workflows to cut planning cycle time by 39% and increase deployment capacity by 21% without adding headcount.

Pioneered Azure's first proactive resilience testing capability — delivering a rack-level drill program in 4 months with a **94% recovery rate** — surfacing critical hardware defects and establishing a new model for continuous customer validation.
microsoft_2023: Championed **enterprise adoption** of AI-driven code generation workflows, conducting customer-facing demos and enablement sessions that drove utilization across 14 key teams and saved **37 engineering hours** monthly.

Influenced the product roadmap toward intent-based YAML generation by facilitating **11+ discovery interviews** with Azure service teams, surfacing critical feature gaps and translating field feedback directly into engineering priorities.
Accelerated time-to-value for internal customers by migrating documentation to an **AI-powered semantic search** tool with rigorous metadata standards, cutting information lookup time by 83%.
microsoft_2022: Generated **$3M in accelerated revenue** and launched Azure regions 28% faster by securing cross-functional alignment on a unified automation prioritization framework across 140+ teams.

Drove a field-sourced product strategy to reduce operational toil during region deployments — conducting discovery with 20+ service teams, identifying **81 hours of manual effort** per region, and building a roadmap to automate critical paths.
Enabled leadership to target automation gaps by engineering a **Power BI dashboard** tracking deployment toil across 140+ teams, directly informing go-to-market prioritization decisions.
amazon_robotics: Achieved **zero operational downtime** during a 2,000+ unit pilot transition by defining the legacy OS migration strategy and mapping dependencies across 1,200+ stations embedded within the robotics engineering org.

Drove **cross-functional alignment** between IT, Operations, and Engineering to implement automated CI/CD pipelines, accelerating the software deployment cycle by 25% and unblocking a critical product release.
Facilitated Agile ceremonies and prioritized the backlog to resolve **40+ high-priority tickets**, stabilizing the developer intake process and improving delivery predictability across the team.
pro_painters: Increased job bookings by **26%** by optimizing end-to-end scoping and invoicing workflows for 200+ monthly proposals, deploying a new CRM process that reduced sales cycle friction and improved customer conversion.

Cut **Customer Acquisition Cost by 13%** and boosted conversions by 2.7% by executing a digital-first go-to-market strategy, optimizing web presence and Google profile to align outreach with target customer needs.
Improved leadership pricing decisions by conducting **profitability analysis** across 1,000+ project records, identifying and closing margin leaks to drive measurable bottom-line impact.
